result.question: 722.6 / 5G-Tronic transmission and EGS52 TCU tuning for 2011 Mercedes G55 AMG W463 M113K — comprehensive technical research covering specs, variants, TCU hardware, tuning vendors, open-source TCM, community findings, and DIY read/write tooling.
result.summary: The question spans hardware specs, vendor ecosystem, open-source alternatives, and community/DIY tooling across a single narrow platform (W463 G55 + M113K + 722.6). Strategy: anchor one query on transmission internals and failure modes, one on EGS52 hardware identity and comms protocol, one on commercial tuning vendors and process specifics, one on the Ultimate-NAG52 open-source project, and one on community/forum primary sources and DIY OBD access — together covering the full stack from physical hardware to software tuning options.

angles.label: Transmission internals and failure modes
angles.query: 722.6 5G-Tronic gear ratios torque capacity solenoid blue-top brown-top conductor plate connector sleeve failure ATF fluid spec
angles.rationale: Surfaces OEM specs, variant differences, and the well-documented conductor plate / sleeve wicking failure pattern that affects 722.6 units — foundational before evaluating any tune.

angles.label: EGS52 TCU hardware and communications protocol
angles.query: EGS52 TCU Mercedes 722.6 part number W463 G55 K-line CAN OBD-II pinout bench flash protocol "N15/3"
angles.rationale: Targets the specific control unit identity, communication bus (K-line vs CAN), physical location on W463, and whether bench access is required — critical for planning any read/write workflow.

angles.label: Commercial tuning vendors and process
angles.query: EGS52 tune Weistec AMG Doctor RaceIQ MK-Ultra G55 AMG shift points fill pressure TCC torque limit OBD bench process price
angles.rationale: Casts a wide net across known vendors and forces results that describe what each tune actually changes (shift strategy, clutch pack overlap, torque limits) plus process and cost — the primary decision criteria.

angles.label: Ultimate-NAG52 open-source TCM project
angles.query: Ultimate-NAG52 open source TCM 722.6 W463 G55 AMG viability install hardware CAN compatibility risk
angles.rationale: Directly targets the GitHub/community project that replaces the EGS52 with custom hardware, surfacing technical requirements, W463 fitment status, and any documented risks or community install reports.

angles.label: Community primary sources and DIY OBD tooling
angles.query: site:mbworld.org OR site:peachparts.com OR site:mercedes-benz-forum.com 722.6 EGS52 G55 W463 tune read write EOBD K-line boot mode
angles.rationale: Queries forum primary sources directly for W463/M113K-specific 722.6 behavior reports, known issues, and any documented DIY OBD or K-line boot procedures — the highest-signal practitioner layer.
